LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Whitespring-verdediging
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Whitespring-oorlogsoplossingen
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Bouw een presidentieel decor zoals Whitespring-tapijten, spiegels, grote stoelen, Whitespring-platen, kandelaars en meer.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: presidentiële inrichting
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Bouw een presidentiële bureaustoel die geschikt is voor hoge Whitespring-functionarissen en hun ceremoniële taken.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: presidentiële bureaustoel
